title: JWT for microservices architectures
seoTitle: JWT Authentication for microservices architectures — Guide
description: jwt authentication microservices — implementation guide with tools and best practices.
content:
JWT for microservices architectures

jwt authentication microservices — how JWT authentication works for microservices architectures.

Architecture

JWTs enable stateless authentication ideal for microservices architectures. The client stores an access token and sends it with each request via the Authorization: Bearer header.

Implementation Checklist

  • Issue short-lived access tokens (5–15 min)
  • Implement refresh token rotation
  • Validate signature, exp, iss, aud on every request
  • Store tokens securely (httpOnly cookies for web)

Test Your Tokens

Use JWT Decoder, JWT Validator, and JWT Debugger during development.

faq.q: What is jwt authentication microservices?
faq.a: A common JWT authentication topic. This guide explains jwt authentication microservices with examples and links to free decoder/validator tools.

faq.q: Are JWT tools on this site free?
faq.a: Yes. All tools run client-side in your browser with no account required.

faq.q: How do I debug JWT errors?
faq.a: Use our JWT Decoder, Validator, and Debugger tools. Paste your token to inspect claims and verify signatures.
